debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ range f = Ran (graph f)

proof:
by
  ext y
  constructor
  · intro hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    exact rfl
  · intro hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact ⟨x, by simpa using hx⟩
failed_attempts:
by
  ext y
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    exact ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  · rintro ⟨x, ⟨rfl, rfl⟩⟩
    exact ⟨x, rfl⟩

by
  ext y
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    exact ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  · rintro ⟨x, hx⟩
    rcases hx with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨x, rfl⟩
successful_attempts:
by
  ext y
  constructor
  · intro hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    exact rfl
  · intro hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact ⟨x, by simpa using hx⟩

by
  ext y
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    simp [graph]
  · rintro ⟨x, hx⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    simpa [graph] using hx
